tools.name: search_events
tools.description: Search COMPAMIR structured news events. Events are deduplicated across multiple sources into single items, with reporting conflicts flagged, in Japanese and English. Each result carries source links. Note: produced by automated AI processing, not exhaustive human verification — cite the provided sou

tools.name: get_event
tools.description: Get a single COMPAMIR event by id, including its source links and conflict note if any.

tools.name: list_conflicts
tools.description: List events where reporting diverges across sources (the signature Conflict Watch). Each item includes a plain-language note on what differs and the source links.
